roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC17(B) MOTION TO REDUCE FELONY TO MISD FILED(AT INSISTENCE)
PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 90D/CTS:3/X:DEFENDANT MAYSERVE REMAINDER OF SENTENCE THROUGH LCA HOME DETENTION,/WS/COMUN:150/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S CURFEW SHALL BE 11:00PM ON WORK DAYS,/X:FURTHER, DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO ATTEND CHURCH SERVICE ON SUNDAY'S FROM 12:30PM TO 4:30PM WHICH INCLUDES COMMUNTE TIME,/X:ON 07-10-11 DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND CHURCH SERVICE FROM 8:45AM TO 4:30PM WHICH INCLUDES COMMUTE TIME,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,605,15 PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE TO THE STATE VICTIM COMPENSATION BOARD,/X:ORDER FOR RESTITUTION AND ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT SIGNE, FILED AND SERVED IN OPEN COURT,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/OR25/SA1:DANIEL VELTRI/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:UPON 18MONTHS SUCCESSFUL PROBATION DEFENDANT MAY PETITION COURT FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/

/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFG/DEFT ADV RTS:001/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:06-17-11/TWS/CONTD:PSR & SENTENCE/DOP/ARBUCKLE/SA1:DANIEL VELTRI/SAORD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/OR/CTORD:AS CONDITIONAL OF O,R,, DEFENDANT MUST REPORT TO PROJECT OR  TWICE AWEEK BY PHONE AND ONCE A WEEK BY PERSON; DO NOT DRINK ANDOBEY ALL LAW/SA1:DANIEL VELTRI/SA2:1980 UNION STREET IN SF/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
